entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
AI is changing the world in ways we never imagined. From self-driving cars to automated programming, AI is transforming the way businesses operate. Apart from AI, I plan to write about my thoughts on various topics. I hope you enjoy reading my musings.

For this post, I wanted to test unique topics combinations using popular LLMs. Here’s a rap limerick on personal happiness — written in Python. Read the comments and the code together, top to bottom, and let it flow 🎤:

Query: Write a rap in the form of a limerick about personal happiness in the form of python code block in blog post.

# A Rap Limerick on Personal Happiness 🎵

def happiness(soul):
    # There once was a soul feelin' low,
    mood = soul.start(feeling="low")

    # Who searched high and hustled below,
    hustle = search_high() + grind_below()

    #   They found joy within,
    joy = soul.look_within()

    #   Said "yo, let me begin,"
    soul.begin(joy)

    # Now they vibin' and stealin' the show! 🎤
    return vibe(joy + hustle)  # the recipe, no cap 🧢

happiness(soul)  # run this daily for best results ✨
entry.summary: AI is changing the world in ways we never imagined. From self-driving cars to automated programming, AI is transforming the way businesses operate. Apart from AI, I plan to write about my thoughts on various topics. I hope you enjoy reading my musings.
